At least 148 dead after reported strike on school, Iran saysIran has blamed the US and Israel for the strike; the US is looking into reports of the incident, while the IDF says it is "not aware" of operations in the area. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c1l7rvqq51eo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c1l7rvqq51eo#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 11:40:44 GMT
